ddls:
CREATE TABLE "building_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the building class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the class */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the class is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building object */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building class the object belongs to */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the building object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the object */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the object is active */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_objects_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES building_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building object the field belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the field */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the field is active */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES building_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Float, Integer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data distribution */,
  "distribution_name" TEXT /* Name of the data distribution (e.g., Uniform, Normal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data distribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the distribution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the distribution */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the distribution is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field the data value belongs to */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Actual data value */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the field */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the field */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the field */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data distribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data value */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data value is active */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data value was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the group is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group membership */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the group */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the group membership was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the group membership */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the group membership is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, construction manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
